children.heading: Requirement
children.label: 1 Requirement
children.text: The Secretary may, in accordance with subsection (b), require a State to repay any payments received by the State pursuant to that the Secretary determines were not expended by the State in accordance with the agreements required to be made by the State as a condition of the receipt of payments under such section.section 300d–11(a) of this title

children.heading: Offset of amounts
children.label: 2 Offset of amounts
children.text: If a State fails to make a repayment required in paragraph (1), the Secretary may offset the amount of the repayment against any amount due to be paid to the State under .section 300d–11(a) of this title

children.heading: Opportunity for hearing
children.label: b Opportunity for hearing
children.text: Before requiring repayment of payments under subsection (a)(1), the Secretary shall provide to the State an opportunity for a hearing.
